metaDesc: Antiguo Testamenton tiempopa, Jesusan jacañapa, ucatsti Pablon thaquinacapa mä cheka mapan arcam — Bibliiajj chekpach chekanacanwa pasi.

s.title: Bibliia mapanacana
s.verse: “Cuna yatichäwinactejj jumanacar Jesucristo Tatitusan ch'amapjjata, uqhamarac jutäwipjjat yatichapcsma ucanacajj janiw jakenacan alek säwi arunacäcänti, jan ucasti nanacaw nayranacajjamp Tatitun khapak cancañapjja uñjapjjta.” (2 Pedro 1:16)
s.purpose: Bibliiajj janiw pantjat amuyäwiquiti. Chekpach chekanacan, urunacan ucatsti sutinacan sarnakir jakenacan cuentapawa. Uca thaquinac mä mapan, tiempo tokerjam arcam — mä chekar limt'am, jan ucajj ▶ limt'asa mä kayut mä kayu sarantam.
s.ot_lead: Janiw mä sap sarnaqäwiquiti, jan ucasti luräwit qalltasin juchat khespiyañ cuentan sarantäwipawa: luräwi ucatsti jucharu jalanta → diluvio ucatsti Babel → mä jawsäwi (Abraham) → arust'at orake → Egiptot mistuwi → wasara → atipjawi → reino → jaljasiwi → exilio → cutt'awi.
s.je_lead: Evangelionacan cuentaparjam Jesusan jacañap arcam, tokerjam — Belenan yuriñapat, bautisäwipa ucatsti Galilean qollasäwipa toke, Samaria makhatasa, Jerusalenan cruz, jacatatäwi ucatsti alajjpacharu mistuwicama.
s.pa_lead: Jerusalenan Pentecostesat, cunjams evangeliojj Judeat anqharu yatatasi — Jisc'a Asia ucatsti Europa toke imperion chuymaparucama. Phisqha thaquinacat maynijj ajllim (nayrïr·payïr·quimsïr + Romar sarnaqäwi + khespiyat qhepa) ucatsti thaquin kellkat cartanacampi Hechosan lurawinacap arcam.
s.foot: Chekanaca · Chekanacajj bíblico qellqata ucatsti bíblico geografía tokerjam sarapjje (yanapt'ir jichha sutinacampi). Lamar lacanaca, jawiranaca ucatsti qutanacajj jist'arat geográfico datonacat (Natural Earth) marcata, jisc'achata.

eden.name: Edén (Luräwi · Jucharu jalanta)
eden.note: Wali suma lurat orakparuw juchajj mantani, ucatsti Diosampi jakempin chinupa p'akiji.
events: Nayrïr evangelio arust'awi — «warmin wawapajj asiron p'ekep takjjatani»

noah.name: Ararat (Diluvio)
noah.today: jichhürunjja Ararat qollu, jak'a jalsu Turquía
noah.note: Diosajj jucham phokhat orakparu juzgi, ucampis mä familia tokew jacañ imi.
events: Arco iris pacto — «janiw wasitatajj diluviompi t'unjañäniti»

babel.name: Babelan torrepa
babel.note: Alajjpacharu puriñ munir jach'a chuymar contra, Diosajj arunacap ch'allthapi ucatsti marcanac orak patar willi.
events: «Mä marca ucatsti mä torre utt'ayañäni… sutisaraquiw jach'añchasiñäni»
Marcanacajj orak patar willt'asi (Sinar — qhepatjja Babilonia)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Bibliian juchat khespiyañ cuentapajj mä sap jaken jawsatapampiw kallti.
events: «Mä jach'a marcaruw tucuyäma… take marcanacaw juma toke bendicitäni»

haran.name: Harán
events: Abramajj patunca phisqhani (75) maranïsina Canaanaru sari

shechem.name: Siquem · Canaán
shechem.note: Arust'at orakenjja mä familiaw utt'ayasi ucatsti pactojj wila masit wila masiru pasi.
events: Canaanaru mantasa, nayrïr altar — «wawanacamaruw aca orake churäma»
Jacoban tunca payani wawanacapa — tunca payani ayllunacan saphipa

egypt.name: Egipto (Gosén)
egypt.note: Mä familiajj mä jach'a marcaru tucu — ucatsti mä esclavo marcaru.
events: Jacoban take familiapajj mach'at khespiyasiñ Egiptoru mantani

sinai.name: Sinaí qollu
sinai.note: Antiguo Testamenton chuyman khespiyäwipa — esclavonacajj Diosan marcaparu tucu.
events: Tunca jan walinaca ucatsti Pascuan corderopa
Tunca Camachinaca, leyi, tabernáculo ucatsti luktäwinaca

kadesh.name: Cades (wasara)
kadesh.note: Jan iyawsañajj mä wila masir orake chhaqhtayi — ucampis Diosajj jupanacampi jak'ancasquiwa.
events: Tunca payani qhaway jakenaca — ucampis marcajj jan iyawsañ muni
Quimsa tunca quimsaqallquni (38) mara wasaran — maná, qenaya ucatsti nina

jericho.name: Jericó
jericho.note: Tucuyar arust'at oraker mantapjje ucatsti catupjje.

shiloh.name: Silo (Jueces)
shiloh.note: Jan reyini, sapa maynisa munañaparjam luri — mä cheka reyiw wakisi.
events: Rut — ch'amac urunacan iyawsäwi, Davidan wila masipan

jerusalem.name: Jerusalén · Mayachat reino
jerusalem.note: Israelan wali suma tiempopa — ucatsti mä wiñay reyin arust'awipa.
events: Saúl nayrïr rey, ucatsti David Goliatampi

samaria.name: Samaria · Jaljat reino
samaria.note: Profetanacan jachatapampi, reinojj jaljasi ucatsti aynacht'i.
events: Elías, Isaías, Jeremías «cuttanipjjam» sas jachapjje — ucatsti Mesías yatiyapjje

nineveh.name: Nínive (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Take yatiyäwi jan ist'asa, aljjir reinojj nayraqui tinqui.
events: Aljjir reinojj Asiria nayrakatapan tinqui (722 a. C.)

babylon.name: Babilonia
babylon.note: Wali ch'amac arumapa — ucampis machakachawi arust'awejj utjasquiwa.
events: Jerusalén tinqui, templo nakhata (586 a. C.)
Daniel ucatsti Ezequiel — exilion iyawsaña ucatsti uñjäwinaca

susa.name: Susa (Persia)
susa.note: Mä pagano imperio chuymapansa, Diosajj marcap imasquiwa.
events: Nehemiasajj rey nayrakatapan mayisi ucatsti qhitata

return.name: Jerusalenaru cutt'awi
return.note: Cutt'anipjje ucatsti wasitat utt'ayapjje — ucampis janiw reyejj jutquiti. Mesías suyt'apjje.
events: Ciron camachipat quimsa cutt'awi (Zorobabel 538 · Esdras 458 · Nehemías 444)
Templo wasitat sayt'ayata ucatsti Jerusalén perqhanaca askichata
Malaquías — Antiguo Testamentojj jist'antasi: «Nayaw apirija qhitä»

bethlehem.name: Belén
bethlehem.note: Arust'at Mesíasajj Davidan marcaparu juti — Arojj janchi tucu.

nazareth.name: Nazaret
nazareth.note: Diosajj mä ina marcan jakjam jilaraqui.
events: Tunca payani maranïsina, templon jisct'asa ucatsti jaysasa

jordan.name: Jordán jawira
jordan.note: Jakenacan taypin luräwip kallti — alajjpachajj Yokapaspjam uñacht'ayi.
events: Ajayujj urpi jamaw aynachti — «Acajj munat Yokajawa»

sychar.name: Sicar (Samaria)
sychar.note: Nayrïr qollasäwi thaqui — Jerusalén toke ucatsti jisc'achat Samaria tuqui.

capernaum.name: Capernaum
capernaum.note: Galilean qollasäwipan utapa — jawsäwi, yatichäwi ucatsti contra sartawejj acan jicthapisi.
events: Reino parábolanaca — ucatsti jilxatir contra sartawi

galilee.name: Galilea quta
events: Phisqha t'ant'ampi pä challwampi phisqha waranqa jakeru manq'ayi

caesarea_p.name: Cesarea de Filipo
caesarea_p.note: Discipulonacajj jupajj Cristopachawa sas amuyapjje, ucatsti cruz thaquejj jist'arasi.
events: Pedron arst'awipa — «Jumajj Cristotawa, jacasir Diosan Yokapa»

jericho.name: Jericó
jericho.note: Jerusalenaru makhatir thaquin, chhaqhat jaki thaqhi.
events: «Jaken Yokapajj chhaqhat thaqhiri ucatsti khespiyiri juti»

bethany.name: Betania
bethany.note: Qhepïr semanapan nayrakatapan jiwañ patar apnakañap uñacht'ayi.
events: Lazaroru jiwatanacat jactayi — «Nayätwa jacatatäwejja ucatsti jacañajja»
Mariajj jiwañ imantap laycu perfumempi phiskt'i
Aca uñacht'awejj jiwayañ amtapa juc'amp ch'amt'ayi

jerusalem.name: Jerusalén
jerusalem.note: Take Bibliian jarawir tucuyawipa — cruz, jacatatäwi, alajjpacharu mistuwi.
events: Atipjawimp mantani; wasitat templo mesanac tijrani
Quimsïr urun jactasa, ucatsti alajjpacharu mistu

antioch.name: Antioquía
antioch.note: Qhitir iglesia, cawcatï gentilanacaru misionajj kallti ucatsti cutti.
events: Mayisiñ taypin Ajayujj Bernabé Saulompi jaljayi
Iglesia cawcansa iyawsirinacajj nayraqui «cristianos» sas sutiyata
Nayrïr, payïr ucatsti quimsïr thaquin qalltäwipa

paphos.name: Pafos
paphos.note: Evangelior contra sartirinacar contra ch'amaw uñacht'ayata.

perga.name: Perge
perga.note: Panfilian mä puerto — acan Juan Marcosajj cutt'i.

pantioch.name: Antioquía de Pisidia
events: Sinagogan khespiyañ cuentat mä jaya yatichäwi
Walja gentilanacajj cusisipjje ucatsti aru catoqhapjje

iconium.name: Iconio
iconium.note: Waljaw iyawsapjje, ucampis persecuciojj nayraru sarañ waqt'i.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: Mä diosjam yupaychata, ucatsti qalampi ch'ojjata.
events: Qalampi ch'ojjata ucatsti jiwatjam jaytata, ucampis sartani

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Walja discipulonaca lurapjje; iglesianac ch'amañchañ laycu thaquip cutt'ayapjje.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Evangeliojj nayraqui Europa tuqui sari uca turcaña chekapa.

philippi.name: Filipos
philippi.note: Europan nayrïr iglesiapa — carcel taypinsa evangeliojj atipji.
events: Chika arumana jayllinaca, mä oraque unujjtawi, carcelero utat khespiyata

thess.name: Tesalónica
thess.note: Arojj marca unujjtayi ucatsti contra sartawejj phallji.

corinth.name: Corinto
corinth.note: Mä mara chika qamasi, jan wali marcan mä iglesia sat'asa.

ephesus.name: Éfeso
ephesus.note: Quimsïr thaquin chuymapa — arojj Asia tuqui yatatasi.
events: Tirano yatiñ utan pä mara sapüru yatichi
Kollke luriri Demetriojj mä ch'ajjwa sartayi

miletus.name: Mileto
events: Irpirinacajj jachapjje, janiw wasitat uñjapcaniti sas yatisa

caesarea.name: Cesarea
caesarea.note: Pä mara gobernadoranacan reyin nayrakatapan evangelio arjjatani.

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Romaru sarir mä alejandrino barcoru mayjt'apjje.

fairhaven.name: Buenos Puertos (Creta)
fairhaven.note: Pablojj «jan juc'ampi sarapjjañäni» siwa, ucampis jan ist'apjjiti.

crete.name: Creta
crete.note: Khespiyat qhepatjja, iglesianac askichañataqui Titoru jaytir islapa.
events: Sapa marcan irpirinac uchañataqui Titoru jayti

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Thaya wayra ucatsti barco t'unjaw taypina, Diosan arust'awipajj phokhasi.
events: «Euroclidón» thayajj barco t'unji, ucampis pä pataca paqallqu tunca sojjtani (276) khespipjje
Mä asiru achji, ucampis jan cuns pasi

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Italiaru puripjje ucatsti iyawsir jilatanacampi jakt'ata.

rome.name: Roma
rome.note: Evangeliojj tucuyar imperion chuymaparu puri — janiw mä tucuyañaquiti, jan ucasti mä qalltañawa.
events: Pä mara utapan catjata, jan ajjsarasa reino yatiyasa
Qhepatjja wasitat catjata, 2 Timoteo kellki ucatsti jiwayata — «Suma ñanjjatïnwa, tucuyar puriwtwa»
